mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_basic (symbol, name, industry, market, listing_date, total_share, float_share, pe, pb, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.symbol}, #{item.name}, #{item.industry}, #{item.market}, #{item.listingDate}, #{item.totalShare}, #{item.floatShare}, #{item.pe}, #{item.pb}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt})
ON CONFLICT (symbol) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, industry = EXCLUDED.industry, market = EXCLUDED.market, listing_date = EXCLUDED.listing_date, total_share = EXCLUDED.total_share, float_share = EXCLUDED.float_share, pe = EXCLUDED.pe, pb = EXCLUDED.pb, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
